title: MooiFun Drawer Liners, Waterproof Shelf Liner, Anti-Slip Non-Adhesive BPA Free Kitchen Cupboard Cabinet Liner Refridge Fridge Mats Sink Protector Strong Durable for Home Office(White/30cm×150cm)
features: 🌓【MATERIAL CAN COME INTO DIRECT CONTACT WITH FOOD】 Refrigerator mat is made of food-grade BPA-free EVA material, the material is durable, antibacterial, and moisture resistant, effectively preventing airborne dust, bacteria, and moisture from penetrating, and remains stable, and undeformed at -40°C. In addition to ensuring the health of you and your family it also protects drawers, fridges, table tops, and worktops from scratches, the material is soft and has a better cushioning effect.

🌔【WATERPROOF & OIL-PROOF, EASIER TO CLEAN】Our washable cupboard liners are resistant to water and oil, if any spills or leaks occur, from smaller spills you can easily wipe the lining with a damp cloth or sponge; As opposed to larger spills, which can be thoroughly rinsed off with soap with the aid of water, the mats are very easy to clean and dry quickly. Either way, they will greet you with a fresh new look.

🌕【EASY TO CUT, INSTALL & REMOVE】The cabinet liners come in several pre-cut sizes to suit most shelf drawers, but can also be customized to a unique size or shape to suit your needs, they are also easy to trim, just measure the area to be used and then use household scissors to trim the liner to the desired size. In addition, kitchen cupboard liners are non-adhesive, easy to install and remove, and will keep the kitchen free from grease, making them a great housewarming gift.

🌖【NON-ADHESIVE, BUT NON-SLIP】Drawer liners are designed with a slightly textured non-slip surface on one side, giving them a good non-slip effect, effectively preventing items from moving around on drawers or cabinet shelves, and a non-adhesive smooth surface on the other side, making it easier to remove them later, ensuring no residual glue is left on the drawer liners after use, so you can use them in almost any space in your home, including refrigerators, cabinets, closets, sinks, etc.

🌗【THICKER & REUSABLE】Compared to other shelf liners made of 150g/㎡ ordinary TPU plastic (not good for health), MooiFun shelf liners are made of 500g-600g/㎡ EVA material, which is thick enough, and the material is also more flexible and soft, it will not curl and easy to lay flat, more durable is suitable for you to wash and dry the liner again and again.
description: Product Description MOOIFUN THICKENED ODOR-FREE WATERPROOF KITCHEN LINERS MAKE YOUR LIFE MORE COMFORTABLE AND TIDY. Are you still worried about stains and scratches on your cabinets? Don't worry, MooiFun will provide you with the perfect storage solution. WHY CHOOSE MOOIFUN SHELF LINERS? BPA-FREE MATERIAL: The kitchen shelf liner is made of food-grade EVA material, which can be in direct contact with food, so you don't have to worry about safety again. SOFT SHOCK ABSORPTION: The cabinet liner is made of EVA material which is softer than PP material, which can give the cabinet an extra layer of protection and keep the cabinet clean as ever. ANTI-SLIP: The bump pattern design is adopted, which increases the slip resistance by 30% compared with the ordinary flat pattern. We believe our products will be better than others and we are proud to say that we use them too. WATERPROOF AND OILPROOF: Whether it is used in the refrigerator or in the kitchen, there is no fear of liquid leakage, and the shelf is always kept clean. EASY TO USE: The material is moderately thick and can be easily trimmed to size for your application. EASY INSTALLATION AND REMOVAL: The non-adhesive surface makes it easier to remove for cleaning and ensures no sticky residue is left on the shelf after removing the cushion. REUSABLE: Compared with ordinary plastics, the materials we use can be guaranteed to be used for more than two years without damage. EASY TO CLEAN: When liquid leaks on the side, you can easily wipe it clean with a soft cloth, brush, or sponge, or just rinse. PERFECT FOR DIFFERENT CHORES AS A DRAWER LINER: The anti-slip function provides more protection for fragile items in the drawer. AS A CABINET/CUPBOARD LINER: Free from oil stains etc., table mats are easy to replace and clean. AS A BOOKSHELF LINER: Prevents dust from sticking to our books and keeps things neat and organized. AS A FRIDGE LINER: Don't worry about cleaning the refrigerator, just take out the refrigerator pad to clean and replace it. AS A SHOE SHELF LINER: Effectively prevent the dust from the sole from falling to the next shoe rack. USE IN THE OFFICE: Protect your desktop from scratches while keeping it tidy. USE IN THE KITCHEN: Keep the kitchen away from oil and keep it clear at all times. USE IN THE BATHROOM: Keeps away dirt buildup and makes cleaning easier. QUESTIONS AND ANSWERS Can refrigerator liners come in direct food contact? Sure. The waterproof refrigerator liner is made of food-grade EVA material and is BPA-free. It is safe to use in direct contact with fruits and vegetables. Do shelf liners smell? Shelf Liner are unscented. What if the corners of the non-stick shelf liner are rolled up? You can flatten some items on the curled side, or speed up the flattening process by softening the product with warm water, and hot air from a hairdryer. Are drawer liners adhesive? They are not adhesive, on the contrary, they are easier to disassemble and clean, and if you have special requirements, you can also use double-sided adhesive to fasten them. Are cabinet liners 100% non-slip? The cabinet liner is non-slip to some extent, but not 100%, depending on the item's shape and weight in contact. I believe they can work well in the office and at home, but they are not suitable for campers or other places that are shaken for a long time. If the requirements for non-slip are strict, it is recommended that you match a storage item with a cushion, such as a drawer divider grid. STEPS FOR USAGE Step 1: Measure the size of the shelf and make a mark on the liner. Step 2: Use household scissors or a utility knife to easily cut the shelf liners. Step 3: Wipe off dust with a damp cloth before use and make sure the surface is thoroughly clean and completely dry. Step 4: Place the cut pads directly on the table without glue. FRIENDLY REMINDER Don't vexpose to the sun for a long time. Keep away from heat and sources of ignition. Don't scratch the surface of the product with sharp objects.
